title: Medical Device Recall
description: Medical device recall notice from the FDA or equivalent regulatory authority.

recall_id.description: Regulatory recall identifier. Commonly found in: FDA recall database, recall notice.

device_name.description: Name of the recalled device. Commonly found in: FDA recall notice, press release.

device_model.description: Model number or name. Commonly found in: FDA recall notice, device label.

device_type.description: Type or category of medical device. Commonly found in: FDA device classification, recall notice.

manufacturer_name.description: Name of the device manufacturer. Commonly found in: FDA recall notice, press release.

manufacturer_country.description: Country of the manufacturer. Commonly found in: FDA recall notice, manufacturer address.

recall_class.description: FDA recall class (I = most serious). Commonly found in: FDA recall database.

recall_type.description: Whether the recall was voluntary or mandatory. Commonly found in: FDA recall notice.

recall_status.description: Current status of the recall. Commonly found in: FDA recall database.

initiated_date.description: Date the recall was initiated. Commonly found in: FDA recall notice.

terminated_date.description: Date the recall was terminated. Commonly found in: FDA recall database.

reason_for_recall.description: Reason or root cause for the recall. Commonly found in: FDA recall notice, press release.

hazard_to_health.description: Description of the health hazard. Commonly found in: FDA recall notice.

units_affected.description: Approximate number of units affected. Commonly found in: FDA recall notice, press release.

lot_numbers.description: Affected lot or batch numbers. Commonly found in: FDA recall notice.

distribution_scope.description: Geographic scope of distribution. Commonly found in: FDA recall notice.

action_required.description: Required action for customers or healthcare providers. Commonly found in: FDA recall notice, press release.

patient_risk_level.description: Assessed risk level to patients. Commonly found in: FDA recall classification.

press_release_url.description: URL of the manufacturer press release. Commonly found in: manufacturer website, FDA press release.

page_title.description: Title of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

favicon.description: Favicon URL of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.
